scripts.build:all: npm run build:landing && npm run build:day1
scripts.zip:landing: npm run build:landing && cd dist-landing && zip -r ../dfd-landing.zip . && cd ..
scripts.zip:day1: npm run build:day1 && rm -rf dist-day1-flat && mkdir dist-day1-flat && cp -r dist-day1/assets dist-day1-flat/ && sed 's|\.\./assets|./assets|g' dist-day1/day1/index.html > dist-day1-flat/index.html && cd dist-day1-flat && zip -r ../dfd-day1.zip . && cd ..
scripts.zip:all: npm run zip:landing && npm run zip:day1
